sourceDebug.sampleAroundTeamList: NRL 2026, Round 21, Late Mail, injuries, team updates, late changes, team lists | NRL.com Skip to main content Main News Watch Travel Draw Ladder Players Stats Fantasy Tipping More About Us Accommodation Careers Child Safety Clubs Community Competitions Hall of Fame Integrity Indigenous Judiciary and Match Review Media Releases Memorabilia NRL Pacific Operations Play Rugby League Watch Overseas Wellbeing and Education Membership Tickets Hospitality Shop Search Log In You have skipped the navigation, tab for page content Team Lists Presented By NRL Late Mail: Round 21 - Panthers lose Edwards Author NRL.com Timestamp Wed 22 Jul 2026, 07:56 PM Share on social media Share via Facebook Share via Twitter Share via Whats-app Share via Reddit Share via Email A blow for the Panthers ahead of Thursday night's Battle of the West with gun fullback Dylan Edwards ruled out. Edwards suffered a head cut during last week's loss to the Broncos that required 10 stitches. The loss of David Fifita to suspension and Cameron Murray and Tallis Duncan to injury has forced the Rabbitohs into a major reshuffle ahead of their crucial clash with the Storm. Goalkicking centre Latrell Siegwalt lines up for his career seventh game while Lachlan Hubner starts at lock and Liam Le Blanc is also set for a call-up. Cowboys coach Todd Payten has recalled experienced playmaker Jake Clifford to partner Tom Dearden in the halves for a bumper showdown against the Broncos at a sold-out Queensland Country Bank Stadium. See all the late mail, official team news and updates for Round 21 of the 2026 NRL Telstra Premiership competition. Casualty Ward: All the injury news Judiciary latest
